summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MDM Mapping Tool Phase 2: User-defined Keyword Rules feature. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all CRUD operations, dialog forms, toggle switches, and sidebar navigation work correctly. Users can create, edit, delete, and toggle keyword matching rules through the UI.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/keyword-rules - lists all active rules (13 seeded: 12 simple + 1 compound)
Backend: GET /api/keyword-rules?include_inactive=true - includes inactive rules
Backend: Seeded rules have correct structure (id, keywords, standard_code, standard_label, confidence, rule_type, active)
Backend: POST /api/keyword-rules - create new simple rule
Backend: POST /api/keyword-rules - create new compound rule with required/exclude keywords
Backend: POST /api/keyword-rules - fails with invalid standard code (400)
Backend: POST /api/keyword-rules - keywords normalized to lowercase
Backend: PUT /api/keyword-rules/{id} - update confidence
Backend: PUT /api/keyword-rules/{id} - update keywords
Backend: PUT /api/keyword-rules/{id} - toggle active status
Backend: PUT /api/keyword-rules/{id} - update standard code
Backend: PUT /api/keyword-rules/{id} - 404 for non-existent rule
Backend: PUT /api/keyword-rules/{id} - 400 when no fields to update
Backend: DELETE /api/keyword-rules/{id} - delete a rule
Backend: DELETE /api/keyword-rules/{id} - 404 for non-existent rule
Backend: Custom rule affects matching (rule is active and available)
Backend: Inactive rules filtered from active-only query
Backend: Create rule generates audit log
Frontend: /keyword-rules page loads with Keyword Rules title
Frontend: Simple Rules section displays 12 seeded rules
Frontend: Compound Rules section displays 1 seeded rule
Frontend: 'Keyword Rules' link in sidebar navigation with Lightning icon
Frontend: New Rule button opens dialog
Frontend: Dialog shows rule type selector (Simple/Compound)
Frontend: Simple rule form shows keywords input
Frontend: Compound rule form shows required and exclude keyword inputs
Frontend: Standard code dropdown populated with all standards
Frontend: Confidence slider (50%-100%) visible
Frontend: Create Rule button saves new rule
Frontend: Edit button opens dialog with pre-filled values
Frontend: Toggle switch activates/deactivates rules
Frontend: Delete button removes rules
Frontend: Toast notifications for create/update/delete actions
Frontend: Compound rule displays Required keywords (green) and Exclude keywords (red)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding description prop

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components and workflows functioning correctly)

seed_data_creation: 13 keyword rules seeded on startup (12 simple + 1 compound). Compound rule restored during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Keyword Rules CRUD feature fully tested. Backend endpoints for GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/keyword-rules all working. Frontend page at /keyword-rules with dialog for create/edit, toggle switches for active status, and delete buttons. Rules are stored in MongoDB keyword_rules collection. Matching engine reads from DB first with hardcoded fallback. 13 seeded rules (12 simple + 1 compound ADULT_ICU).
